payload.description:
Feature: Code quality comments on PR #139 are resolved safely

Scenario: Apply only actionable fixes from github-code-quality
Given PR #139 has machine-generated review comments
When maintainers implement scoped changes for valid findings
Then the flagged code-quality concerns are addressed
And command behavior remains unchanged
And CI remains passing for the pull request
payload.title: Define expected behavior for addressing PR #139 code-quality comments
